title: Saudi Chicken Kebabs
description: A traditional Middle Eastern-inspired dish, marinated chicken grilled to perfection with a crispy twist.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Arabian spice blend, citrus zest, and 2 tbsp olive oil.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated chicken onto kebab skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with crispy rice and a sprinkle of citrus zest.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as rice, salad, or roasted vegetables.
